Talent Pool

Search reusable TalentBuzz profiles, review linked applications, and open communication recordings when they exist.

Sift

AI-powered filter translator and smart narrowing assistant. Use natural language, then refine with canonical chips to avoid duplicate roles, skills, and repeated reasons.

Try: Java in Manila, talent only with resume, incomplete profiles

Upload LinkedIn PDF

Parse a LinkedIn profile PDF, preview extracted details, auto-score the prospect, then save to BuzzPool sourcing.

Upload a LinkedIn PDF export. TalentBuzz will preserve line structure, detect Top Skills / Summary / Experience / Education, and extract cleaner prospect details. You can also attach a resume for the lead.
Optional. Upload a resume to attach to the lead record.

Upload CSV

Bulk upload prospects into BuzzPool with AI scoring and preview before save.

Expected columns:
full_name, current_title, total_experience, skills, current_company, location, email, phone, linkedin_url, summary_of_experience, education

BuzzPool Outreach

Send a tracked BuzzPool invite using the send-buzzpool-invite edge function.

This uses your live invite edge function and writes tracking into buzzpool_invites.
For bulk outreach, paste one email per line or separate emails with commas.
If left blank, TalentBuzz will generate a recruiter-attributed TalentBuzz link automatically.
